incorrect_examples.task:
Log in and submit a feedback tip for improving the company review process on Glassdoor, detailing specific areas where enhancements can be made.
Only use http://glassdoor.com to achieve the task. Don't go to any other site. The task is achievable with just navigation from this site.

reasoning.create_content: Log in and submit a feedback tip on Glassdoor detailing improvements to the company review process

incorrect_examples.raw_response: (create_content, "Log in and submit a feedback tip on Glassdoor detailing improvements to the company review process")

incorrect_examples.task:
Log in to your Glassdoor account, submit a new anonymous review for a company of your choice, then delete that review immediately, confirming that it has been removed from your profile.
Only use http://glassdoor.com to achieve the task. Don't go to any other site. The task is achievable with just navigation from this site.

reasoning.create_review: Submit an anonymous company review on Glassdoor.
reasoning.delete_review: Immediately delete the newly submitted review.
reasoning.view_dashboard: Confirm the review no longer appears on your profile/dashboard.

incorrect_examples.raw_response:
(create_review, "Submit an anonymous company review on Glassdoor.")
(delete_review, "Immediately delete the newly submitted review.")
(view_dashboard, "Confirm the review no longer appears on your profile/dashboard.")

incorrect_examples.task:
Log in to your Glassdoor account, post a new comment in a community discussion about job search tips, then delete your comment and verify that it is no longer displayed.
Only use http://glassdoor.com to achieve the task. Don't go to any other site. The task is achievable with just navigation from this site.

reasoning.post_comment: Post the new comment in the community discussion
reasoning.view_activity: Verify the comment no longer appears in activity/discussion
